subject: english
note: Full 30-level vocabulary bank (300 items). Tier 1 diagnostic → Tier 2 core/academic → Tier 3 literary/abstract/character (L15 gate) → Latin roots basic/intermediate/advanced(L20 gate)/applied → Greek roots basic/intermediate/advanced/applied → prefixes (negation/quantitative/latin) → suffixes (inflectional/derivational, L30 gate). Unlocks cloze L6+ (after L10), reading L10+ (after L15).
